name: @salvatoret/iroh
description: TypeScript bindings for iroh, the modular networking stack

scripts.build:wasm:node: CC=${CC:-clang} AR=${AR:-ar} wasm-pack build crate --target nodejs --out-dir pkg/nodejs
scripts.build:wasm:browser: CC=${CC:-clang} AR=${AR:-ar} wasm-pack build crate --target bundler --out-dir pkg/bundler
scripts.build:wasm: pnpm build:wasm:node && pnpm build:wasm:browser && rm -f crate/pkg/nodejs/.gitignore crate/pkg/bundler/.gitignore
